summary: Health Monitor — 1s p99 read latency for status API
description_md:
The Connector Health Monitor's status API must meet strict latency requirements to ensure reliable real-time monitoring of all connected data sources across multi-tenant environments.

- p99 read latency ≤ 1000ms for status API calls under 1000 RPS
- p95 read latency ≤ 500ms for status API calls
- API availability ≥ 99.9% measured over rolling 30-day window
- Status cache refresh interval ≤ 5 seconds for active connectors
- Graceful degradation: fallback to cached status when data source unreachable
